name: Farmhouse White Bread

ingredients.item: butter for drizzling and greasing the loaf pan.

method: Add yeast to warm water and 1 t sugar. Mix well and let rest for 10 minutes or until bubbles form on top. Combine flour and salt. Add yeast mixture slowly until dough is combined and knead for 7-10 minutes. Add flour to handle the dough if needed. Coat with olive oil and cover with a clean towel. Let rise for one hour or until doubled in a warm place. Turn dough onto a semolina-dusted flat surface and knead dough a little more. Grease a loaf pan with butter and transfer dough. You can make a small slit on top and drizzle melted butter if you like. Let rise until dough has reached about an inch past the top of the pan. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. I made this bread for about 30 years using this same recipe. Makes one loaf. Olé.
